description: You are a computer science researcher building a network analysis library called 'citation_network'. The core Graph data structure and test suite are complete, but the analysis algorithms are currently empty stubs. Implement the required algorithms in 'network/metrics.py' (pagerank using power iteration, betweenness_centrality using Brandes' algorithm, and clustering_coefficient for local and global triangle counting), 'network/community.py' (synchronous label_propagation), and 'network/io.py' (read_edge_list for SNAP-style lists, write_edge_list, and to_adjacency_matrix). Ensure all 19 tests in the 'tests/' directory pass without modifying 'network/graph.py' or the test files themselves.
